overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning in a covered concrete corridor, descending stairs to an open plaza with digital billboards, walking past a seated individual, continuing along a sidewalk with distinctive green architecture, and finally descending to a waterfront area beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete pedestrian corridor with support pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered concrete corridor with tiled flooring and fluorescent overhead lighting

entered.detail: gray concrete walls with yellow-green trim running along the corridor
rectangular windows with red horizontal shutters set into the concrete walls
long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the corridor ceiling
thick square concrete pillars supporting the corridor roof
large square gray tiles covering the corridor floor with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a covered concrete pedestrian corridor. The space features gray concrete walls with red-shuttered windows, fluorescent overhead lighting, and a tiled floor with scattered trash. The corridor is empty of people and leads toward a stairwell visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell transitioning from indoor corridor to outdoor plaza

events.description: entering stairwell at end of corridor, beginning descent
transitioning from artificial fluorescent lighting to natural daylight as approaching outdoor exit

agents.ego_description: descending a concrete staircase, moving from the enclosed corridor toward the outdoor plaza below

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls with yellow trim lining the stairwell
wide concrete steps with white edge markings descending to lower level
silver metal handrails along the right side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairwell, transitioning from the artificially lit corridor to natural daylight. The stairwell features smooth concrete walls, metal railings, and wide steps. As the descent continues, the bright outdoor plaza becomes visible at the exit, marking a clear shift from enclosed to open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with large digital advertising displays and concrete barriers

events.description: exiting stairwell into bright open plaza with futuristic cityscape visible
approaching and passing seated individual on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking across an open sunlit plaza with large digital billboards, approaching and passing a seated person resting against a planter

notable_agents.action: seated on the ground next to a large concrete planter, surrounded by scattered cardboard and belongings

entered.detail: large vertical digital screens displaying colorful advertisements including 'BIG' soda brand
low gray concrete barriers lining the edge of the plaza
rectangular white concrete planter with sparse vegetation
tall skyscrapers with glass facades and neon signage in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into a bright open plaza, the scene reveals a futuristic urban environment with towering digital billboards advertising various products. The camera passes a seated individual resting against a concrete planter on the right, while concrete barriers line the left side of the walkway. The atmosphere is sunny and open, contrasting sharply with the previous enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway alongside commercial buildings

events.description: moving from open plaza to sidewalk alongside distinctive green building
turning slightly to follow walkway as approaching stair descent

agents.ego_description: walking along a sidewalk beside a distinctive green commercial building, passing pedestrians including one in a business suit and another in an orange jacket ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark business suit walking toward the camera
pedestrian in orange jacket and green pants walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: multi-story building with distinctive green and white facade and red window frames
tall palm trees in planters along the right side of the walkway
large concrete elevated highway or monorail structure running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a sidewalk next to a distinctive green commercial building with red window accents. Palm trees line the right side of the path near an elevated highway structure. The camera passes a pedestrian in a suit walking in the opposite direction and follows another pedestrian in an orange jacket who is heading toward a stairway leading down.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: descending stairs from street level to lower waterfront promenade
moving under the elevated highway overpass with water visible to the right

agents.ego_description: descending stairs to a lower waterfront area, moving beneath an elevated highway overpass while following the pedestrian in the orange jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket and hat ascending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: calm greenish water of the waterfront harbor area
simple rectangular concrete benches along the promenade
wooden or concrete dock pilings extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The camera descends stairs to a lower waterfront promenade, moving beneath the massive concrete structure of an elevated highway. The water surface becomes visible to the right, with dock structures extending into the harbor. Concrete benches line the walkway, and the lighting becomes more diffused under the overpass. The futuristic cityscape with digital billboards remains visible in the distance across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a sterile, enclosed concrete corridor into a sprawling, sunlit cyberpunk cityscape and finally down to a shaded waterfront. It begins by moving through a dim pedestrian walkway of gray concrete and fluorescent lights before descending a stairwell that opens from artificial gloom into bright natural daylight. As the camera emerges into a wide plaza, the environment expands into a futuristic urban hub dominated by towering digital billboards and open concrete walkways. The scene then shifts along a sidewalk past green commercial architecture and palm trees, following pedestrians beneath the shadow of an elevated highway. Finally, the camera descends a second set of stairs to a lower promenade, where the lighting becomes diffused under the massive overpass as the view opens up to a harbor with docks and the distant city skyline.
